# Product Configurator for Stock

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }}

This module adds a button in Picking to Configure Product.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

1. allow_configuration field show visibility of Configure/Reconfigure Product button.
2. If Picking type have boolean true then only configure a product on that specific type of picking record, else can't configure a product.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/product-configurator/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us smashing it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/product-configurator/issues/new?body=module:%20product_configurator_stock%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

Hook to allow custom line values to be put on the newly
created or edited lines.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator_stock.wizard.product_configurator.ProductConfiguratorPicking.action_config_done
documentation: Parse values and execute final code before closing the wizard

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator_stock.models.stock_move.StockMove.reconfigure_product
documentation:
Creates and launches a product configurator wizard with a linked
template and variant in order to re-configure a existing product. It is
esetially a shortcut to pre-fill configuration data of a variant

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_configurator_stock.models.stock_picking.Picking.action_config_start
documentation: Return action to start configuration wizard
